name: WillScot Holdings Corp
summary: PART I Unless the context otherwise requires, we, us, our and Company refers to WillScot Holdings Corporation ("WillScot") and our subsidiaries. Our Company Headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona, we are a leading business services provider specializing in innovative and flexible turnkey temporary space solutions.
